rationale: Implemented reenter_gate derivation for remediation next steps and covered it in resolver unit tests.
Added the reenter_gate constant, passed next_step through resolver result writers, and mapped run_fix_* next steps to reenter_gate.
Replaced the explicit step loop with an any() expression while limiting fallback eligibility to reconstructable step instructions.
Split child-run snapshot persistence into payload-building, artifact-write, record-update, and owner-principal helper functions with concrete type hints.
Review summary only; its actionable items are tracked by the associated line comments.
Automated review header/details only; no separate code action requested.
Jira child-run snapshot artifacts are now created and completed with the execution owner principal instead of service:jira-orchestrate.
Title-only steps no longer enable edit/rerun parameter fallback without an authoritative snapshot.
